raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "ACA 4 would reduce the local vote threshold for approval of bond and special tax measures from two-thirds to 55%.",
    "Over 2,200 local revenue measures have been placed before voters since 2001.",
    "Nearly 80% of all two-thirds supermajority measures garnered more than 55% 'yes' votes but ultimately failed because they fell slightly short of the two-thirds threshold.",
    "For every dollar spent on infrastructure, there is a benefit of several dollars return to the economy from the activities that support construction.",
    "Infrastructure projects improve communities and create new local jobs."
  ]
}
```
